expectedClassifications.notes: Pushes header metrics into a parent layout context on mount/update and clears on unmount. This is a legitimate lifecycle side effect -- the component must tell the layout what metrics to display while mounted. Has cleanup (returning null on unmount). The interpreter classifies as EXTERNAL_SUBSCRIPTION because it sees cleanup + no state setter, but this is not subscribing to an external source -- it is imperatively pushing state into a context setter. Borderline case: reasonable people could argue EXTERNAL_SUBSCRIPTION if you squint at the cleanup pattern. Source: SystemsContainer.tsx
